apps.name: Bad Piggies HD Free
apps.subtitle: Free HD pig-building physics game.
apps.localizedDescription: Bad Piggies HD Free is the free-to-play high-definition version of the physics-based construction game set in the Angry Birds universe. Players design and build creative vehicles using a variety of parts to help the pigs complete challenging levels. Focused on experimentation, engineering, and problem-solving, this HD edition offers enhanced visuals optimized for larger screens along with a limited selection of content available in the free version.

apps.name: Bad Piggies HD
apps.subtitle: Build crazy pig contraptions in HD.
apps.localizedDescription: Bad Piggies HD is the high-definition iPad edition of the physics-based construction game set in the Angry Birds universe. Players design and build inventive vehicles using a variety of parts to help the pigs navigate challenging levels. With a strong focus on creativity, experimentation, and engineering problem-solving, this HD version delivers enhanced visuals and an optimized experience for larger screens while retaining all the core gameplay mechanics of the original.

apps.name: Bad Piggies Free
apps.subtitle: Free version of the pig-powered physics game.
apps.localizedDescription: Bad Piggies Free is the free-to-play version of the physics-based construction game set in the Angry Birds universe. Players build creative vehicles and contraptions using various parts to help the pigs reach their goals. With a focus on experimentation, problem-solving, and inventive engineering, this version provides access to select levels and gameplay features from the full game in a limited free format.

apps.name: Bad Piggies
apps.subtitle: Build contraptions and help the pigs fly.
apps.localizedDescription: Bad Piggies is a physics-based puzzle and construction game set in the Angry Birds universe, where players take control of the pigs instead of the birds. Build creative vehicles and contraptions using a variety of parts to guide the pigs safely to their destination. With dozens of challenging levels, sandbox-style experimentation, and inventive engineering gameplay, Bad Piggies focuses on creativity, problem-solving, and trial-and-error fun as players design machines to overcome obstacles.

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars II
apps.subtitle: Join the Pork Side in a Star Wars sequel.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Star Wars II is the sequel to the original Star Wars crossover game, featuring characters and storylines from the Star Wars prequel trilogy. Players can choose to fight for the Birds or join the Pork Side, unlocking dozens of playable characters with unique abilities. Use lightsabers, Force powers, and special skills across physics-based puzzle levels inspired by iconic Star Wars locations. With character swapping, collectible figures, and expanded gameplay mechanics, this installment adds more depth and variety to the Angry Birds formula.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars HD
apps.subtitle: Star Wars crossover puzzle action in HD.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Star Wars HD is the high-definition iPad edition of the Star Wars crossover installment in the Angry Birds series. It blends classic slingshot puzzle gameplay with iconic Star Wars characters, abilities, and settings. Players can wield lightsabers, blasters, and Force powers while progressing through themed levels inspired by the Star Wars universe. With enhanced visuals optimized for larger displays, this HD version delivers the full galactic adventure in improved detail.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Star Wars
apps.subtitle: The Angry Birds Star Wars crossover adventure.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Star Wars combines the classic slingshot gameplay of Angry Birds with characters, locations, and abilities inspired by the Star Wars universe. Play as iconic heroes like Luke Skywalker and Han Solo—or join the dark side as Darth Vader and Imperial pigs—as you battle through physics-based puzzle levels set across famous Star Wars locations. Use lightsabers, blasters, and Force-powered abilities to defeat the pigs and progress through the galaxy in this crossover adventure.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Space HD
apps.subtitle: Space-based Angry Birds puzzles in HD.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Space HD is the high-definition iPad edition of Angry Birds Space, taking the classic slingshot gameplay into outer space. Players battle the pigs across planets with unique gravity fields, orbital physics, and zero-gravity environments. Each level introduces new challenges that require mastering trajectory, gravity, and special bird abilities. With enhanced visuals optimized for larger screens, Angry Birds Space HD delivers the full interstellar puzzle experience in high definition.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Space
apps.subtitle: Launch birds through space and gravity fields.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Space takes the classic bird-flinging gameplay beyond Earth and into the cosmos. After a giant claw kidnaps their eggs, the Angry Birds chase the pigs through space, battling across planets with unique gravity fields and orbital mechanics. Master new bird abilities, navigate challenging environments, and solve creative physics-based puzzles that add an entirely new dimension to the Angry Birds formula. Featuring dozens of space-themed worlds and innovative gameplay mechanics, Angry Birds Space delivers one of the most unique adventures in the series.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Seasons HD
apps.subtitle: Seasonal Angry Birds fun in HD.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Seasons HD is the high-definition iPad edition of Angry Birds Seasons, featuring themed episodes inspired by holidays, festivals, and seasonal celebrations from around the world. Use the slingshot to launch birds, defeat the pigs, and solve hundreds of physics-based puzzles across beautifully themed environments. With enhanced visuals for larger screens and one of the biggest level collections in the series, Angry Birds Seasons HD delivers the complete seasonal Angry Birds experience.

apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Seasons is a special edition of the classic Angry Birds game featuring themed episodes inspired by holidays, festivals, and seasonal events from around the world. Launch unique birds, topple creative pig structures, and complete hundreds of physics-based puzzle levels set across Halloween, Christmas, Easter, Valentine's Day, and many more celebrations. With frequent content updates throughout its original release, Angry Birds Seasons offers one of the largest collections of levels in the Angry Birds series.

apps.subtitle: The Rio adventure in stunning HD.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Rio HD is the high-definition iPad edition of the popular Angry Birds and Rio crossover. After being captured and transported to Rio de Janeiro, the Angry Birds must escape, rescue their feathered friends, and take on a variety of unique challenges inspired by the hit animated film. Featuring enhanced visuals for larger screens, creative level designs, and the classic physics-based gameplay fans love, Angry Birds Rio HD delivers the complete Rio adventure in high definition.

After being captured and taken to Rio de Janeiro, the Angry Birds must escape their captors, rescue exotic birds, and overcome a variety of unique challenges. Featuring physics-based puzzles, memorable characters, and themed levels inspired by the film, Angry Birds Rio offers a fresh twist on the classic Angry Birds formula.

apps.name: Angry Birds Go!
apps.subtitle: Fast-paced kart racing on Piggy Island.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Go! is a kart racing game set in the Angry Birds universe, where players race as their favorite birds and pigs across colorful tracks on Piggy Island. Upgrade vehicles, unlock new characters, compete in special events, and master unique abilities to gain an edge over opponents. Featuring exciting races, customizable karts, and a variety of game modes, Angry Birds Go! brings high-speed racing action to the world of Angry Birds.

apps.name: Angry Birds Epic
apps.subtitle: Turn-based RPG adventure in Piggy Island.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Epic is a turn-based role-playing game set in the Angry Birds universe. Assemble a team of familiar bird heroes, craft powerful equipment, learn unique abilities, and battle your way across Piggy Island. Featuring strategic combat, character progression, challenging boss battles, and a humorous fantasy setting, Angry Birds Epic offers a fresh RPG experience while retaining the charm of the Angry Birds franchise.

apps.name: Angry Birds Classic HD
apps.subtitle: The original Angry Birds in HD.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Classic HD is the high-definition iPad edition of the original physics-based puzzle game. Use the slingshot to launch unique birds, destroy the pigs' fortresses, and clear hundreds of challenging levels with enhanced visuals designed for larger screens. Featuring the classic gameplay, iconic characters, and addictive level design that made Angry Birds a worldwide hit, this version delivers the authentic HD Angry Birds experience.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: Angry Birds Classic
apps.subtitle: The original Angry Birds experience.
apps.localizedDescription: Angry Birds Classic is the original physics-based puzzle game that started the global Angry Birds phenomenon. Launch a flock of unique birds with a slingshot to defeat the pigs, destroy their structures, and complete challenging levels. Featuring hundreds of handcrafted stages, classic gameplay, and the iconic art style that made the series famous, Angry Birds Classic delivers the authentic bird-flinging experience that players know and love.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Taking pictures

apps.name: UTM
apps.subtitle: Virtual machines for iOS (QEMU-based).
apps.localizedDescription: UTM is a virtual machine app for iOS that allows users to run operating systems such as Windows, Linux, and other x86/ARM environments using QEMU emulation and virtualization techniques. It supports a wide range of configurations including desktop OS installation, terminal-based systems, and legacy software testing. UTM is intended for advanced users who want to run full virtual machines on mobile devices for development, testing, and educational purposes.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: The virtual machine may access the local network. UTM may also use the network to communicate with local servers.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: UTM requests location data periodically to ensure the system keeps the background process active. Location data will never leave the device.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: UTM requests location data periodically to ensure the system keeps the background process active. Location data will never leave the device.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: UTM requests location data periodically to ensure the system keeps the background process active. Location data will never leave the device.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Permission is required for any virtual machine to record from the microphone.

apps.name: XPatcher
apps.subtitle: ROM patching tool for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: XPatcher is an iOS utility developed by Wh0ba designed for patching and modifying game ROM files directly on-device. It allows users to apply patches to supported ROM formats, enabling ROM hacks, translations, and gameplay modifications without needing a computer. The tool is intended for advanced users working with legally obtained game ROMs and focuses on simple on-device patch application.

apps.name: Rewound
apps.subtitle: Retro record-style music player for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: Record is a retro-inspired music player for iOS that recreates the look and feel of a classic record player interface. It allows users to play music from their library using a stylized turntable UI, focusing on nostalgia and visual presentation rather than advanced playback features. The app is designed for users who enjoy vintage audio aesthetics and interactive music experiences on modern devices.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Rewound needs access to your library to get the media files.
privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: Rewound needs access to your music library to control your music.

apps.name: OldOS
apps.subtitle: Simulated iOS 4 experience for modern devices.
apps.localizedDescription: OldOS is a nostalgia project that recreates the look and feel of iOS 4 on modern iOS devices. It simulates classic system apps, UI interactions, and visual design elements to provide an authentic early iPhone experience. OldOS is not a full operating system or emulator, but rather an interactive UI recreation focused on design accuracy and nostalgia for early iOS users and developers.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: To view, play, and experience your music in OldOS, please enable access to your music library.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: To take photos in OldOS, please enable access to your camera.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: To view and manage your contacts in OldOS, please enable access to your contacts list.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: To enable maps to work properly, and see your current wifi network in Settings, please enable access to your location. Then close and re-open the Maps app.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: To record your audio while filming a video in OldOS, please in enable microphone access.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: To view, manage, and add photos to your photo library in OldOS, please enable access. Then close and re-open the Photos app.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: To view, manage, and add photos to your photo library in OldOS, please enable access. Then close and re-open the Photos app.

apps.name: XeniOS
apps.subtitle: Xbox 360 emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: XeniOS is an experimental Xbox 360 emulator for iOS designed to explore compatibility and runtime emulation of Xbox 360 software on modern mobile hardware. It focuses on research and development use, aiming to test rendering pipelines, system behavior, and partial game compatibility where possible. Performance and compatibility are highly limited due to the complexity of Xbox 360 emulation and are dependent on device hardware and build version.

apps.name: StikNES
apps.subtitle: NES emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: StikNES is a Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) emulator for iOS that allows users to play compatible NES game backups on supported devices. It features accurate emulation, save states, customizable controls, and performance optimizations for smooth gameplay on mobile hardware. StikNES is intended for retro gaming enthusiasts and users who legally own game copies they wish to run on iOS devices.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to import images for customization.

apps.name: Firebird
apps.subtitle: TI-Nspire calculator emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: Firebird Emu is a TI-Nspire calculator emulator for iOS developed by adriweb. It allows users to run TI-Nspire CAS and non-CAS software images on supported devices for educational and development purposes. The emulator replicates the functionality of Texas Instruments’ TI-Nspire platform, enabling students and educators to use calculator software, documents, and math tools on mobile devices. It is intended for educational use and requires legally obtained system files.

apps.name: Mini vMac
apps.subtitle: Classic Macintosh emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: Mini vMac is an emulator that replicates early Apple Macintosh systems, allowing users to run classic Mac OS software on modern devices. It focuses on accuracy and simplicity, emulating older Macintosh hardware for retro computing, education, and preservation purposes. Users can load compatible disk images to experience classic Macintosh applications and games.

apps.name: ActiveGS
apps.subtitle: Apple IIgs emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: ActiveGS is an Apple IIgs emulator for iOS that enables users to run compatible classic Apple IIgs software, games, and demos on modern devices. It emulates the original hardware system with support for disk images and retro computing environments, delivering an authentic experience of Apple’s 16-bit era. ActiveGS is intended for retro computing enthusiasts and users who legally own software they wish to run.

apps.name: Ready
apps.subtitle: Commodore 64 emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: C64 by Spiderlab is a Commodore 64 emulator for iOS that allows users to run classic C64 software, games, and demos on modern devices. It emulates the original hardware environment, including CPU, graphics, and sound, providing an authentic retro computing experience. The app is designed for retro computing enthusiasts and supports loading disk and cartridge images where legally available.

apps.name: iNDS
apps.subtitle: Nintendo DS emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: iNDS is a Nintendo DS emulator for iOS that allows users to play compatible DS game backups on supported devices. It features save states, customizable controls, and performance optimizations for smoother gameplay on mobile hardware. iNDS is intended for users who legally own game copies and want to experience Nintendo DS titles on iPhone and iPad.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Need Permission to Access Photos

apps.name: Flycast
apps.subtitle: Dreamcast & NAOMI emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: FlycastiOS is a Dreamcast, NAOMI, and Atomiswave emulator for iOS devices. It allows users to run compatible game backups using high-performance emulation with support for modern rendering backends, controller input, and save states. Flycast is known for strong compatibility and active development across multiple platforms, bringing classic SEGA arcade and console titles to mobile devices.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Flycast uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Flycast requires microphone access to emulate the Dreamcast microphone
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Flycast can save screenshots to your Photo library.

apps.name: Play!
apps.subtitle: PlayStation 2 emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: Play! is a PlayStation 2 emulator designed to run PS2 game backups on supported devices. It focuses on accuracy and portability, using a high-level emulation approach to reproduce PS2 game behavior across multiple platforms, including iOS. Compatibility varies by game, and performance depends heavily on device hardware. Play! is intended for users who legally own game copies and want to experiment with PS2 emulation on mobile devices.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Play! uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.

apps.name: MeloNX
apps.subtitle: Nintendo Switch emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: MeloNX is a Nintendo Switch emulator designed for iOS devices, allowing users to run compatible game backups through software-based emulation. It focuses on performance optimization, controller support, and improved compatibility for select titles depending on device hardware. MeloNX is intended for advanced users and requires legally obtained game files for use.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MeloNX needs access to your Photo Library in order to save images

apps.name: iPSX2
apps.subtitle: PlayStation 2 emulator for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: iPSX2 is a PlayStation 2 emulator for iOS that allows users to run compatible PS2 game backups on supported devices. It is designed to emulate console hardware and provide gameplay through software-based rendering and system emulation. Performance may vary depending on device hardware and game complexity. This app is intended for users who legally own game copies and want to test or play them on iOS devices.

apps.name: XinaA12
apps.subtitle: XinaA15 jailbreak for iOS 15.0–15.1.1
apps.localizedDescription: XinaA15 (often referred to as Xina Jailbreak) is a semi-untethered jailbreak designed for iOS 15.0 through 15.1.1 on compatible devices. It provides rootless jailbreak functionality, enabling tweak injection, system customization, and package management through a modified jailbreak environment. XinaA15 is intended for advanced users and developers and focuses on early iOS 15 jailbreak support with experimental stability improvements.

apps.name: Etason JB
apps.subtitle: EtasonJB jailbreak for iOS 8.4.1 (32-bit)
apps.localizedDescription: EtasonJB is a semi-untethered jailbreak designed for 32-bit iOS devices running iOS 8.4.1. It enables system customization, tweak installation, and package management on supported legacy devices. EtasonJB is built for older hardware and focuses on stability and compatibility for iOS 8 environments.

apps.name: OD1N
apps.subtitle: Od1n jailbreak utility for iOS 15–16.x
apps.localizedDescription: Od1n is a jailbreak-related utility designed for compatible iOS devices, providing exploit-based functionality and system-level tools used in jailbreak workflows. It is intended for advanced users and developers, offering features for device inspection, testing, and jailbreak environment support on supported firmware versions. Some builds may include experimental or development-stage components.

apps.name: FREYA15
apps.subtitle: FREYA15 jailbreak for iOS 15.x.
apps.localizedDescription: FREYA15 is a jailbreak tool designed for compatible devices running iOS 15.x. It provides exploit-based system access to enable customization, tweak injection, and advanced device modification on supported firmware. This build is intended for developers and advanced users, and may include experimental features depending on device and iOS version compatibility.

apps.name: MeridianFix
apps.subtitle: Meridian jailbreak fix for iOS 10.
apps.localizedDescription: MeridianFix is a patched and updated build of the Meridian jailbreak designed to improve stability and compatibility on iOS 10 devices. It provides semi-untethered jailbreak functionality, enabling tweak injection, system customization, and package manager support on supported firmware. This build focuses on fixing known issues in earlier Meridian releases for a smoother jailbreak experience on legacy devices.

apps.name: rootlessJB4
apps.subtitle: Rootless jailbreak for iOS 12–13
apps.localizedDescription: rootlessJB4 is a lightweight, rootless jailbreak designed for compatible iOS 12 and iOS 13 devices. It focuses on providing basic jailbreak functionality without modifying the system root filesystem, enabling safer system tweaks and development testing. This build is primarily intended for developers and advanced users experimenting with jailbreak techniques and compatibility.

apps.name: Phoenix
apps.subtitle: Phoenix jailbreak for iOS 9.3.5.
apps.localizedDescription: Phoenix is a semi-untethered jailbreak designed for 32-bit iOS devices running iOS 9.3.5. It enables system customization, tweak installation, and third-party package management through Cydia on supported legacy devices. Phoenix is optimized for older hardware and provides a stable jailbreak solution for iOS 9 users.

apps.name: p0laris
apps.subtitle: p0laris jailbreak for iOS 9.3.4–9.3.5.
apps.localizedDescription: p0laris is a jailbreak tool designed for 64-bit iOS devices running iOS 9.3.4 and 9.3.5. It provides kernel-level exploit functionality to enable system customization, tweak injection, and third-party package management on supported devices. Built for legacy firmware, p0laris focuses on stability and compatibility for older iOS environments.

apps.name: EverPwnage
apps.subtitle: iOS 8.0 - 9.3.6 Jailbreak for 32-bit Devices
apps.localizedDescription: EverPwnage is a jailbreak tool designed for older, legacy iOS devices and firmware versions. It provides exploit-based access to enable device customization, tweak injection, and package manager support on compatible systems. EverPwnage is intended for advanced users working with legacy iOS environments and focuses on extending jailbreak functionality to older hardware and software combinations.

apps.name: Electra
apps.subtitle: Electra jailbreak for iOS 11.0–11.4.1.
apps.localizedDescription: Electra is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed by CoolStar for iOS 11.0 through iOS 11.4.1. It enables system customization, tweak injection, and third-party package management using Cydia or Sileo depending on the build. Electra uses kernel-level exploits to provide a stable jailbreak experience for supported devices on iOS 11.

apps.name: daibutsu
apps.subtitle: iOS 8.4.1 Jailbreak optimized for A5 devices.
apps.localizedDescription: Daibutsu is a jailbreak-related utility designed for compatible iOS devices, providing system-level access and exploit-based functionality for supported firmware versions. It is intended for advanced users and developers working within the iOS jailbreak ecosystem, offering tools and features used in testing, research, and device modification workflows. Daibutsu may include experimental components depending on the build.

apps.name: Dopamine
apps.subtitle: Dopamine jailbreak for iOS 15–16.6.1.
apps.localizedDescription: Dopamine is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed for iOS 15 through iOS 16.6.1. It uses modern exploit techniques to enable rootless system modifications, tweak injection, and full device customization while maintaining system stability. Dopamine is designed for performance and reliability on modern iOS versions and supports a wide range of compatible devices with a focus on a clean, user-friendly jailbreak experience.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Dopamine needs to access your photo library to support picking a boot logo

apps.name: Taurine
apps.subtitle: Taurine jailbreak for iOS 14.0–14.8.1.
apps.localizedDescription: Taurine is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed by CoolStar for iOS 14 through iOS 14.3. It provides full system customization capabilities including tweak injection, theming, and package management via Sileo. Taurine is optimized for speed and stability, offering a modern jailbreak experience with improved reliability and performance across supported devices.

apps.name: Odyssey
apps.subtitle: Odyssey jailbreak for iOS 13–13.7.
apps.localizedDescription: Odyssey is a semi-untethered jailbreak developed for iOS 13 through iOS 13.7. It uses modern exploit chains to provide system-level access, enabling tweak injection, theming, and advanced device customization. Odyssey includes support for the Sileo package manager and is designed with stability, performance, and a smooth user experience in mind for supported devices.

privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: For selecting a custom theme image

apps.name: Chimera Patched
apps.subtitle: Patched Chimera jailbreak for iOS 12.
apps.localizedDescription: Chimera Patched is a modified version of the original Chimera jailbreak designed for compatibility fixes and extended device support on iOS 12.x firmware. It provides a semi-untethered jailbreak experience with support for tweak injection, system customization, and package management through Sileo. This patched build is intended for advanced users and testers and may include experimental or unofficial modifications not present in the original release.

apps.name: Chimera
apps.subtitle: Chimera jailbreak for iOS 12–12.5.7.
apps.localizedDescription: Chimera is a jailbreak tool developed by the Electra Team for compatible iOS 12 devices. It provides a semi-untethered jailbreak experience with support for tweak injection, system customization, and package management via Sileo. Chimera is designed to be stable and efficient, focusing on performance and reliability for supported firmware versions in the iOS 12 jailbreak ecosystem.

apps.name: unc0ver
apps.subtitle: Jailbreak devices on 11.0 to 14.8
apps.localizedDescription: unc0ver is a jailbreak tool designed for supported iOS versions, using kernel-level exploits to enable customization, system access, and third-party package installation on compatible devices. It provides a semi-untethered jailbreak experience with support for tweak injection, filesystem access, and jailbreak management tools. This build is intended for advanced users and developers working within the iOS jailbreak ecosystem.

apps.name: kokeshi9
apps.subtitle: Jailbreak 64-bit devices on 9.2 to 9.3.5.
apps.localizedDescription: kok3shi99999 beta is a development build of the kok3shi jailbreak for compatible 64-bit devices on older iOS versions. It is intended for testing and experimental use, providing kernel-level exploitation to enable jailbreak functionality on supported firmware. This build is unstable and primarily used by developers and advanced users for compatibility testing and research purposes.

apps.name: wtfis
apps.subtitle: Untethered iOS 8.0 - 8.4.1 64-bit Jailbreak
apps.localizedDescription: WTFis is a jailbreak-related utility designed for supported iOS versions, providing access to system-level information and internal device details used in jailbreak environments. It is intended for advanced users and developers working with jailbroken devices, offering insights into system state, device properties, and runtime environment data in a simple interface.

apps.name: socket
apps.subtitle: iOS 10 semi-untethered jailbreak for 32 bit devices.
apps.localizedDescription: Socket is an iOS utility designed for compatible devices running supported versions of iOS. It provides the functionality required by various customization and system-management tools, serving as a foundation for supported workflows within the iOS community. The app is lightweight, easy to use, and intended for devices that meet its version and compatibility requirements.

apps.name: Scarlet
apps.subtitle: Personal Scarlet sideloading client.
apps.localizedDescription: Scarlet Personal is a modified build of Scarlet designed for personal sideloading and app management on iOS. It provides tools for installing and organizing IPA files, managing repositories, and maintaining a personal app library. With support for custom sources and streamlined installation workflows, Scarlet Personal offers a convenient way to manage sideloaded applications directly from your device.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This app needs to access the local network to do wireless installs.

apps.name: AltStore
apps.subtitle: Alternative app marketplace for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: AltStore is an alternative app marketplace that allows users to sideload and manage applications on iPhone and iPad using their own Apple ID. It features support for app sources, IPA installation, automatic app refreshing through AltServer, and a growing ecosystem of community-created apps. AltStore provides a user-friendly way to discover, install, and maintain apps outside of the traditional App Store experience.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: AltStore uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.

apps.name: SideStore
apps.subtitle: Refresh and sideload apps anywhere.
apps.localizedDescription: SideStore is an open-source iOS sideloading application that allows users to install, refresh, and manage IPA files directly on their device. Built as an alternative to AltStore, it enables app refreshing without requiring a computer on the same network by using a dedicated VPN-based pairing system. SideStore supports custom sources, app management, and convenient sideloading workflows, making it a powerful solution for installing apps outside the App Store.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: SideStore uses the local network to find and communicate with your device.

apps.name: Feather
apps.subtitle: Modern IPA signing and sideloading.
apps.localizedDescription: Feather is a modern iOS sideloading application that lets users sign, manage, and install IPA files directly on their device. Featuring a clean interface, certificate and provisioning profile management, repository support, and app library organization, Feather streamlines the sideloading experience while making it easy to discover, sign, and install applications from trusted sources.

apps.name: ESign
apps.subtitle: Sign and install IPA files on iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: ESign is an iOS app signing utility that allows users to import, sign, and install IPA files directly on their device using compatible certificates and provisioning profiles. It includes tools for certificate management, app signing, IPA importing, and installation, providing a convenient way to manage sideloaded applications without requiring a computer for everyday use.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: 授权后才能使用您的相机进行扫一扫
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: 开启定位服务，我们将根据您的位置,为您提供相关信息。在未经许可前不会开启定位服务，请放心使用。
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: 授权后才能将图片保存到本地相册
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: 授权后才能访问您的手机相册，您才能上传对应的图片
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This identifier will be used to deliver personalized ads to you

apps.name: Ksign
apps.subtitle: On-device IPA signing and installation.
apps.localizedDescription: Ksign is a lightweight iOS application that allows users to sign and install IPA files directly on their device using personal certificates. It features certificate management, provisioning profile support, app library organization, and a clean interface designed for sideloading workflows. Ksign makes it easy to import, sign, and install apps without needing a computer after initial setup.

apps.name: GBox
apps.subtitle: App installer and sideloading platform for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: GBox is an iOS application platform that provides tools for installing, managing, and organizing apps outside of the traditional App Store experience. It offers access to app libraries, direct installation features, and app management utilities through a streamlined interface. GBox is designed to simplify app discovery and installation while providing a convenient experience for users seeking alternative app distribution methods.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: Grant access to the sandbox. Required for app functionality.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: 是否权允许访问相机，以导入照片
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: 是否授权允许使用面容ID，以加密您的资料
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: 需要发现并连接到局域网内的设备
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: 是否权允许相册授权，以导入相册或者视频
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: 是否权允许访问相册，以导入相册或者视频
